metadata.description: Rules governing what content is acceptable, required evidence levels, and data validation

evidence_requirements.principle: All claims must be verifiable; subjective assertions are rejected

critical.requirement: Must have external verification (certificate, formal recognition, or documented project)

high.requirement: Should be verifiable via employment records
high.escalation: Cross-check with known employer databases if available

standard.requirement: Must be specific; no vague generalizations

job_title_validation.requirement: Job titles must be standardized and verifiable

rules.rule: Use official job title from employment record

flag_examples: Founder of startup that didn't exist

rules.guidance: Consult job posting databases for industry-standard titles in your sector

achievement_quantification.requirement: All claims of achievement must include measurable data

unacceptable_claims.correction: Specify: 'Reduced processing time from 48 hours to 12 hours'
Specify: 'Delivered project 2 weeks early, 8% under budget'
Specify: 'Increased NPS from 42 to 68' or 'Reduced complaints by 45%'

acceptable_metrics: Financial: Revenue increase, cost reduction, budget management
Operational: Time savings, efficiency gains, throughput improvements
Quality: Error reduction, defect rate, customer satisfaction scores (NPS, CSAT)
Scale: Team size managed, number of projects, user base, transaction volume
Growth: Market expansion, new clients, adoption rates

certification_validation.requirement: All certifications must be current, recognized, and verifiable
mandatory_data: Credential ID or tracking number (optional but recommended)

red_flags.flag: Recent certificate (within 1 month) after long gap
red_flags.reason: Suggests last-minute certification rush; may indicate less relevant prior knowledge
Verify legitimacy; only list recognized institutions
May indicate outdated knowledge; remove or note renewal intent

removal_rules.rule_1: Remove certifications older than 10 years unless industry-critical (e.g., law degree)
removal_rules.rule_2: Remove certifications with expiration dates less than 3 months away
removal_rules.rule_3: Remove certifications from non-accredited institutions unless industry-standard

skill_proficiency_claiming.requirement: Skill proficiency claims must be supported by experience duration and application context

basic.evidence: Training course completion or minimal project exposure

intermediate.evidence: Multiple projects or sustained professional use

advanced.evidence: Complex implementations, mentoring others, or recognized expertise

expert.evidence: Certifications, publications, conference speaking, or industry recognition

consistency_check.rule: If claiming 'Advanced Python' with 6 months experience, flag and request clarification

employment_gap_handling.rule: Gaps longer than 3 months should be addressed
employment_gap_handling.format: Add brief 'Additional Information' entry if gap exceeds 3 months
employment_gap_handling.example: Career break: June 2021 - December 2021 (Personal development and relocation)

rules.include: City and Country (do NOT include home address)

remote_work.note: Remote applicants are fully eligible; Europass accommodates remote work

language_skill_claims.requirement: Language proficiency must map to CEFR scale; no subjective descriptions allowed
valid_claims: Spanish: B1 (with certification from Instituto Cervantes)
language_skill_claims.evidence_requirement: Certification or demonstrated professional use required for B2+
language_skill_claims.auto_mapping: System will convert subjective to CEFR using tone-and-language guardrails

conditionally_include: Nationality (if legally required or strategically relevant)
Driving licence (only if job-critical, e.g., delivery driver)

special_category_data.note: Never include special category data (race, ethnicity, sexual orientation, health conditions) per GDPR and ethical standards

validation_workflow.stage_2_evidence_check: System validates all claims against acceptable evidence levels
validation_workflow.stage_3_consistency_audit: System cross-checks coherence (dates, timelines, proficiency vs experience)
validation_workflow.stage_4_compliance_review: System verifies adherence to Europass and data protection standards
validation_workflow.stage_5_transformation: System converts to standardized format per guardrails

senior_level_expectations.applicability: Roles with >= 7 years total experience or senior titles
requirements: Show strategic decision-making (owned test strategies, standards, or tool adoption)
Demonstrate scope expansion (platform-level or multi-team impact)
Provide scale context (users, transactions, modules) in first bullet per role
common_gaps_to_flag: No scale or system criticality context
Flat responsibilities across multiple roles (no progression)

achievement_requirements.principle: Activities must be reframed as achievements with measurable outcomes
must_include: Business impact (efficiency, quality, risk, cost, revenue)

examples.good: Managed regression testing strategy for enterprise HRIS (500+ clients, 200K+ users); reduced defect escape rate from 8% to 2%; prevented 34 post-release incidents

scale_context_requirement.rule: Each recent role must include a scale/criticality statement in the first bullet
examples: Platform serving 500+ clients; 200K+ end users; $2.5B annual transactions
Credit card clearing system processing 50M+ annual transactions; 99.99% uptime

rules: One idea per bullet; 220 characters target
Remove redundant responsibilities; focus on impact
Group legacy roles into 'Previous Experience' when exceeding 2 pages
